pastPerformance: MarketEdge is a social and digital enterprise that helps mission-driven organizations sharpen market-based solutions, embed innovation into strategy and operations, build local capabilities, and forge high-impact partnerships across industries, sectors, and humanitarian initiatives. We support both international and local organizations with tailored consulting services and digital tools to infuse innovation and operational efficiencies into high-impact programs exceeding expectations of the market actors, funders, and stakeholders that invest in them.
